title: Trump Criticizes NATO's Iran Stance as 'Foolish'
summary: Trump rebukes NATO for declining to assist with Iran, calling it a 'very foolish mistake'.
charlotte_impact: Highlights divisions in international alliances amid rising tensions in the Middle East.

title: Counterterrorism Chief Resigns Amid Iran War Concerns
summary: The National Counterterrorism Center director resigns, reportedly due to disagreements over the handling of the potential Iran war.
charlotte_impact: Signals significant internal dissent within the US government regarding Iran policy.

title: Senate to Debate Trump's Voting Bill
summary: The Senate will vote on Trump's proposed voting bill, aimed at 'guaranteeing the midterms'.
charlotte_impact: Sets the stage for a contentious debate over election security and voting rights.

title: Government Shutdown Could Close Airports: Official
summary: A government shutdown may result in airport closures, according to a Trump administration official.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the potential consequences of political gridlock on essential services.

title: Primary Turnout Lower Than Early Voting Surge
summary: Election Day turnout for the 2026 primary is lower than the amped-up early voting numbers.
charlotte_impact: Indicates a shift in voter behavior towards early voting methods.

title: Roberts Defends Supreme Court Against Trump's Criticism
summary: Chief Justice Roberts defends the Supreme Court in response to attacks from Trump.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing tension between the executive and judicial branches.

title: Asteroid 'Fireball' Spotted Over PA, Ohio
summary: NASA reports a 'fireball' over Pennsylvania and Ohio was caused by a 7-ton asteroid.

title: AIPAC's Role in Illinois Democratic House Races

title: California Pipeline Restarts After Trump Order
summary: Oil flows resume through a controversial California pipeline following an order from Trump.

title: MTA Sues Trump Administration for Subway Funding

title: Families Search for Loved Ones After Pakistan Strike on Kabul Rehab
summary: Families are desperately searching for their loved ones following a deadly Pakistan strike on a rehab center in Kabul.

title: S&P 500 Rises Amid Iran Conflict Turmoil
